title: Fix Persistent Console Errors Including Undefined Tutorial Tag on Object Pages
description:
Two categories of persistent console errors were identified:

1. **Generic template error** — An error originating from the base page template used across the application, likely a leftover from the starter template.

2. **Undefined tutorial tag on /object/ pages** — The WordPress tutorials API was being called with `tags=undefined` on `/object/` pages, which threw an error. The fix sets the correct tag ID (224) for object pages so the tutorials API call succeeds.

The WordPress tutorials API endpoint is: `https://datatoolspro.com/wp-json/wp/v2/tutorials?tags=224`
acceptance_criteria: No console errors appear on standard page loads
The /object/ page correctly passes tag=224 to the WordPress tutorials API
The generic template error from the starter template is eliminated
WordPress tutorials load correctly on the /object/ page
middleware_changes: Fixed undefined tutorial tag parameter on /object/ pages to use tag ID 224. Eliminated a generic error from the base page template.
implementation_notes: The tutorials widget calls the WordPress REST API for contextual help content. Each page type needs the correct tag ID. The /object/ pages were missing the tag mapping, causing tags=undefined in the API call.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed both console errors and deployed to the development environment.
